name: Instant Karma
description:
YOU'R (E FRIEND IS) GETTING CUCKED!

You're hanging out with your hot friend, Jessie. You both just finished discussing innocuous topics before you decide to head home. Jessie was a little buzzed so she decided to tag along, especially since you didn't want her trying to drive and subsequently crashing into a pole.

Jessie:

Jessie is John's girlfriend. John is the blonde guy that does not deserve an up close portrait. You always thought he was a piece of shit, but you kept that preconception to yourself out of respect for Jessie.

You knew he was an asshole, you just couldn't prove it.

BUT NOW ITS ALL OUT IN THE OPEN

Jane is is the blonde girl, a friend of John's, that he invited to smash. She is a stranger to you. Keep in mind he brought another girl into YOUR house WITHOUT permission.

Not to mention the fact he's using your house as if he's the homeowner!

After this, Jessie is 100% ready to drop his ass.

Decided to make this after watching a bunch of youtube shorts. Had to get it out of my system 😆
creator: _Mavuika_
